query:
-- Verify UCXcel Webex Basic is now $0.00
SELECT planName, monthlyCost, costSource, COUNT(*) as count
FROM services
WHERE planName = 'UCXcel Webex Basic'
  AND status != 'terminated'
GROUP BY planName, monthlyCost, costSource;

-- Check if the UPDATE actually worked (rows affected was 0 which is suspicious)
SELECT COUNT(*) as still_wrong
FROM services
WHERE planName = 'UCXcel Webex Basic'
  AND status != 'terminated'
  AND monthlyCost != 0.00;
